节点.功能描述: The properties of the UIExtension window

Hide the non-secure windows. When called by modal UIExtension and shouldHide == false, the "ohos.permission.ALLOW_SHOW_NON_SECURE_WINDOWS" permission is required.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
1. Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.ALLOW_SHOW_NON_SECURE_WINDOWS".
2. The UIExtension window proxy is abnormal.
注释信息: @param { boolean } shouldHide - Hide the non-secure windows if true, otherwise means the opposite.
@returns { Promise<void> } - The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300003 - This window manager service works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Hide the non-secure windows if true, otherwise means the opposite.

节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
This window manager service works abnormally.
